name: cortex
description: Human-brain-like memory & cognition for Claude Code. Always-on lifecycle integration that cooperates with native features (not replaces them) and cuts tokens via an embedded LLM (ollama, local or cloud). Faculties: Perception (read-compress), Expression (terse EN/TH), long-term Memory (episodic/semantic/Core Memory by อริยสัจ4), and Cognition (critical thinking + อภิธรรม wisdom).
